column4: Begins with minimal work experience, relies heavily on direct instructions, and requires close supervision to complete tasks
column5: Starts taking initiative by completing assigned tasks reliably, seeks clarification when needed, and proactively reports completion
column6: Identifies problems within their scope, suggests solutions, and takes initiative to improve processes with some guidance
column7: Manages tasks independently, solves problems proactively without supervision, and reports progress periodically, reducing the need for oversight
column8: Takes ownership of entire areas of work, innovates within their role to add value, mentors others, and contributes strategically to organizational goals
column9: Pursues independent projects or side ventures, experiments with ideas, and begins to understand market needs and entrepreneurial principles
column10: Launches a startup or small business, starts generating revenue, builds a customer base, and navigates initial business challenges
column11: Successfully grows the business, scales operations to meet increasing demand, implements systems for sustainability, and expands the team and market presence
column12: Launches a scalable and innovative startup with a strong vision, applies best practices, and focuses on creating significant market impact
column13: Achieves product-market fit, accelerates growth, manages increasing operational complexity, and focuses on customer acquisition and retention
column14: Positions the company as a market or industry leader, drives innovation, shapes market trends, and mentors emerging leaders
column15: Repeats entrepreneurial success across multiple ventures, refines effective startup methodologies, invests in or advises other startups, and contributes significantly to the entrepreneurial ecosystem
column16: Begins sharing expertise to guide others, focusing on mentorship and advisory roles
column17: Invests personal resources in early-stage ventures, combining financial support with mentorship
column18: Manages larger-scale investments aimed at significant impact, often in collaboration with others
column19: Focuses on creating a lasting legacy through substantial contributions to societal well-being
